title: Alpha
synopsis: Two fierce female agents tackle dangerous missions in a thrilling world of espionage, as they navigate perilous situations, execute daring stunts, and face unexpected turns in this action-packed adventure.

synopsis_lang.en: Two fierce female agents tackle dangerous missions in a thrilling world of espionage, as they navigate perilous situations, execute daring stunts, and face unexpected turns in this action-packed adventure.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 兩位驍勇善戰的女特務，在驚心動魄的諜報世界中執行危險任務。她們穿梭於危機四伏的處境，上演大膽特技，並在充滿動作場面的冒險中，迎向意想不到的轉折。

cast: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Bobby Deol, Anil Kapoor

cast_lang.en: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Bobby Deol, Anil Kapoor
cast_lang.zh_hk: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Bobby Deol, Anil Kapoor

subtitle: English
